title: Carly Conversation Log
description: Structured output from a Carly customer service conversation

customer_intent.description: Short phrase describing what the customer wanted

questions_asked.description: List of questions the customer asked

resolved.description: Whether the customer's questions were answered

escalated.description: Whether the conversation was escalated to a human

escalation_reason.description: Why the conversation was escalated, or null

booking_link_provided.description: Whether Carly directed the customer to the booking page
